name: QUALCOMM INC/DE
summary: QUALCOMM Incorporated is a semiconductor and telecommunications company focused on the development and commercialization of wireless technology. The company operates through its QCT (semiconductor) and QTL (technology licensing) segments, developing and supplying integrated circuits and system software for mobile devices, automotive, IoT, and computing applications, while licensing its extensive intellectual property portfolio related to wireless communications standards including CDMA and OFDMA technologies.
